name: Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
1. Add yeast to warm water and dissolve.
2. In a small bowl, stir together flour, sugar, and salt.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture to the liquid mixture.
4. Use your hands to work the dough until it is soft and firm but not sticky. If necessary, add about 1 tbsp more flour.
5. Knead dough until smooth and elastic, about 5 minutes.
6. Grease a medium-sized bowl.
7. Lightly grease your fingertips and place the dough in the bowl.
8. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate several hours or overnight.
9. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
10. Grease a cookie sheet.
11. Divide dough into 15 pieces.
12. Roll each piece from the center out into a pencil thin rope about a foot long.
13. Loop each rope into the shape of a pretzel.
14. Brush each pretzel with beaten egg using a pastry brush.
15. Sprinkle with coarse salt.
16. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
